  • Method
Package com.github.query4j.core

Interface QueryBuilder<T>

Type Parameters:
T - the entity type this query builder operates on
All Known Implementing Classes:
DynamicQueryBuilder
public interface QueryBuilder<T>
Core interface for dynamic query building with fluent API design.

Provides comprehensive support for JPA query construction with advanced features including complex filtering, joins, aggregations, pagination, and caching.

This interface follows the Builder pattern, allowing method chaining for readable and maintainable query construction. All implementations must be immutable to ensure thread safety.

Example usage: 


 List<User> users = QueryBuilder.forEntity(User.class)
         .where("active", true)
         .and()
         .where("department", "Engineering")
         .orderBy("lastName")
         .limit(50)
         .cached()
         .findAll();
Since:
1.0.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    QueryBuilder<T>
    and()
    Adds an AND logical operator between conditions.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    avg(String numericFieldName)
    Adds an AVG (average) aggregation function for numeric fields.
    DynamicQuery<T>
    build()
    Builds and returns a DynamicQuery instance without executing it.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    cached()
    Enables caching for this query with default settings.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    cached(long timeToLiveSeconds)
    Enables caching for this query with specified time-to-live.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    cached(String cacheRegionName)
    Enables caching for this query in the specified cache region.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    closeGroup()
    Closes the current group of conditions (equivalent to closing parentheses).
    long
    count()
    Executes a count query and returns the number of matching results.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    count(String fieldName)
    Adds a COUNT(fieldName) aggregation function.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    countAll()
    Adds a COUNT(*) aggregation function.
    CompletableFuture<Long>
    countAsync()
    Executes a count query asynchronously.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    customFunction(String functionName, String fieldName, Object... parameters)
    Adds a custom database function call.
    boolean
    exists()
    Checks if any results exist for this query.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    exists(QueryBuilder<?> subquery)
    Adds an EXISTS subquery condition.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    fetch(String associationFieldName)
    Adds a fetch join to eagerly load the specified association.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    fetchSize(int fetchSize)
    Sets the fetch size hint for result processing.
    List<T>
    findAll()
    Executes the query and returns all matching results.
    CompletableFuture<List<T>>
    findAllAsync()
    Executes the query asynchronously and returns all matching results.
    T
    findOne()
    Executes the query and returns the first result, or null if no results.
    CompletableFuture<T>
    findOneAsync()
    Executes the query asynchronously and returns the first result.
    Page<T>
    findPage()
    Executes the query and returns paginated results with metadata.
    static <T> QueryBuilder<T>
    forEntity(Class<T> entityClass)
    Creates a new QueryBuilder instance for the specified entity class.
    QueryStats
    getExecutionStats()
    Returns query execution statistics and performance metrics.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    groupBy(String... fieldNames)
    Adds GROUP BY clause with specified fields.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    having(String aggregatedFieldName, String operator, Object value)
    Adds a HAVING condition for aggregated results.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    hint(String hintName, Object hintValue)
    Sets a query hint for performance tuning.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    in(String fieldName, QueryBuilder<?> subquery)
    Adds an IN subquery condition.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    innerJoin(String associationFieldName)
    Adds an INNER JOIN on the specified association field.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    join(String associationFieldName)
    Adds an INNER JOIN on the specified association field.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    leftJoin(String associationFieldName)
    Adds a LEFT JOIN on the specified association field.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    limit(int maxResults)
    Sets the maximum number of results to return.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    max(String fieldName)
    Adds a MAX aggregation function to find maximum value.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    min(String fieldName)
    Adds a MIN aggregation function to find minimum value.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    nativeQuery(String sqlQuery)
    Executes a native SQL query instead of JPA criteria.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    not()
    Adds a NOT logical operator to negate the next condition.

    notExists(QueryBuilder<?> subquery)
    Adds a NOT EXISTS subquery condition.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    notIn(String fieldName, QueryBuilder<?> subquery)
    Adds a NOT IN subquery condition.

    Sets the number of results to skip.
    QueryBuilder<T>

    Opens a new group of conditions (equivalent to opening parentheses).

    or()
    Adds an OR logical operator between conditions.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    orderBy(String fieldName)
    Adds ascending ORDER BY for the specified field.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    orderBy(String fieldName, boolean ascending)
    Adds ORDER BY with specified direction.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    orderByDescending(String fieldName)
    Adds descending ORDER BY for the specified field.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    page(int pageNumber, int pageSize)
    Sets pagination using page number and page size.

    parameter(String parameterName, Object parameterValue)
    Sets a named parameter for native queries.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    parameters(Map<String,Object> parameterMap)
    Sets multiple named parameters for native queries.

    rightJoin(String associationFieldName)
    Adds a RIGHT JOIN on the specified association field.

    select(String... fieldNames)
    Specifies which fields to select in the query result.

    sum(String numericFieldName)
    Adds a SUM aggregation function for numeric fields.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    timeout(int timeoutSeconds)
    Sets the query timeout in seconds.

    toSQL()
    Generates the SQL representation of this query for debugging purposes.

    Adds an equality condition to the query.

    Adds a condition with a specific operator.

    Adds an IN condition for the specified field.

    Adds an IS NOT NULL condition.

    Adds an IS NULL condition.

    Adds a LIKE pattern matching condition.

    Adds a NOT IN condition for the specified field.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    whereNotLike(String fieldName, String pattern)
    Adds a NOT LIKE pattern matching condition.

  • Method Details

    • forEntity

      static <T> QueryBuilder<T> forEntity(Class<T> entityClass)
      Creates a new QueryBuilder instance for the specified entity class.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the entity type
      Parameters:
      entityClass - the JPA entity class, must not be null
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if entityClass is null
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • where

      QueryBuilder<T> where(String fieldName, Object value)
      Adds an equality condition to the query.
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the field name, must not be null or empty
      value - the expected value, may be null
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance with the condition added
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if fieldName is null or empty
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • where

      QueryBuilder<T> where(String fieldName, String operator, Object value)
      Adds a condition with a specific operator.
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the field name, must not be null or empty
      operator - the comparison operator (=, !=, <, <=, >, >=, LIKE), must not be null
      value - the comparison value, may be null for IS NULL/IS NOT NULL operators
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance with the condition added
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if fieldName or operator is null or empty, or operator is invalid
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • whereIn

      QueryBuilder<T> whereIn(String fieldName, List<Object> values)
      Adds an IN condition for the specified field.
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the field name, must not be null or empty
      values - the list of possible values, must not be null or empty
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance with the condition added
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if fieldName is null/empty or values is null/empty
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • whereNotIn

      QueryBuilder<T> whereNotIn(String fieldName, List<Object> values)
      Adds a NOT IN condition for the specified field.
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the field name, must not be null or empty
      values - the list of excluded values, must not be null or empty
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance with the condition added
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if fieldName is null/empty or values is null/empty
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • whereLike

      QueryBuilder<T> whereLike(String fieldName, String pattern)
      Adds a LIKE pattern matching condition.
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the field name, must not be null or empty
      pattern - the pattern to match (supports % and _ wildcards), must not be null
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance with the condition added
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if fieldName or pattern is null or empty
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • whereNotLike

      QueryBuilder<T> whereNotLike(String fieldName, String pattern)
      Adds a NOT LIKE pattern matching condition.
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the field name, must not be null or empty
      pattern - the pattern to exclude, must not be null
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance with the condition added
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if fieldName or pattern is null or empty
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • whereBetween

      QueryBuilder<T> whereBetween(String fieldName, Object startValue, Object endValue)
      Adds a BETWEEN range condition.
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the field name, must not be null or empty
      startValue - the start value (inclusive), must not be null
      endValue - the end value (inclusive), must not be null
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance with the condition added
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any parameter is null or fieldName is empty
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • whereIsNull

      QueryBuilder<T> whereIsNull(String fieldName)
      Adds an IS NULL condition.
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the field name, must not be null or empty
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance with the condition added
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if fieldName is null or empty
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • whereIsNotNull

      QueryBuilder<T> whereIsNotNull(String fieldName)
      Adds an IS NOT NULL condition.
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the field name, must not be null or empty
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance with the condition added
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if fieldName is null or empty
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • and

      QueryBuilder<T> and()
      Adds an AND logical operator between conditions.
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • or

      QueryBuilder<T> or()
      Adds an OR logical operator between conditions.
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • not

      QueryBuilder<T> not()
      Adds a NOT logical operator to negate the next condition.
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • openGroup

      QueryBuilder<T> openGroup()
      Opens a new group of conditions (equivalent to opening parentheses).
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • closeGroup

      QueryBuilder<T> closeGroup()
      Closes the current group of conditions (equivalent to closing parentheses).
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if no group is currently open
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • join

      QueryBuilder<T> join(String associationFieldName)
      Adds an INNER JOIN on the specified association field.
      Parameters:
      associationFieldName - the association field name, must not be null or empty
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if associationFieldName is null or empty
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • leftJoin

      QueryBuilder<T> leftJoin(String associationFieldName)
      Adds a LEFT JOIN on the specified association field.
      Parameters:
      associationFieldName - the association field name, must not be null or empty
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if associationFieldName is null or empty
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • rightJoin

      QueryBuilder<T> rightJoin(String associationFieldName)
      Adds a RIGHT JOIN on the specified association field.
      Parameters:
      associationFieldName - the association field name, must not be null or empty
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if associationFieldName is null or empty
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • innerJoin

      QueryBuilder<T> innerJoin(String associationFieldName)
      Adds an INNER JOIN on the specified association field. This is an alias for join(String) for improved readability.
      Parameters:
      associationFieldName - the association field name, must not be null or empty
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if associationFieldName is null or empty
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • fetch

      QueryBuilder<T> fetch(String associationFieldName)
      Adds a fetch join to eagerly load the specified association.
      Parameters:
      associationFieldName - the association field name, must not be null or empty
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if associationFieldName is null or empty
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • select

      QueryBuilder<T> select(String... fieldNames)
      Specifies which fields to select in the query result.
      Parameters:
      fieldNames - the field names to select, must not be null or empty array
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if fieldNames array is null, empty, or contains null/empty elements
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • countAll

      QueryBuilder<T> countAll()
      Adds a COUNT(*) aggregation function.
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • count

      QueryBuilder<T> count(String fieldName)
      Adds a COUNT(fieldName) aggregation function.
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the field to count, must not be null or empty
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if fieldName is null or empty
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • sum

      QueryBuilder<T> sum(String numericFieldName)
      Adds a SUM aggregation function for numeric fields.
      Parameters:
      numericFieldName - the numeric field to sum, must not be null or empty
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if numericFieldName is null or empty
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • avg

      QueryBuilder<T> avg(String numericFieldName)
      Adds an AVG (average) aggregation function for numeric fields.
      Parameters:
      numericFieldName - the numeric field to average, must not be null or empty
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if numericFieldName is null or empty
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • min

      QueryBuilder<T> min(String fieldName)
      Adds a MIN aggregation function to find minimum value.
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the field to find minimum value, must not be null or empty
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if fieldName is null or empty
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • max

      QueryBuilder<T> max(String fieldName)
      Adds a MAX aggregation function to find maximum value.
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the field to find maximum value, must not be null or empty
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if fieldName is null or empty
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • groupBy

      QueryBuilder<T> groupBy(String... fieldNames)
      Adds GROUP BY clause with specified fields.
      Parameters:
      fieldNames - the fields to group by, must not be null or empty array
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if fieldNames array is null, empty, or contains null/empty elements
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • having

      QueryBuilder<T> having(String aggregatedFieldName, String operator, Object value)
      Adds a HAVING condition for aggregated results.
      Parameters:
      aggregatedFieldName - the aggregated field name, must not be null or empty
      operator - the comparison operator, must not be null or empty
      value - the comparison value, may be null
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if aggregatedFieldName or operator is null or empty
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • orderBy

      QueryBuilder<T> orderBy(String fieldName)
      Adds ascending ORDER BY for the specified field.
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the field name to sort by, must not be null or empty
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if fieldName is null or empty
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • orderByDescending

      QueryBuilder<T> orderByDescending(String fieldName)
      Adds descending ORDER BY for the specified field.
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the field name to sort by, must not be null or empty
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if fieldName is null or empty
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • orderBy

      QueryBuilder<T> orderBy(String fieldName, boolean ascending)
      Adds ORDER BY with specified direction.
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the field name to sort by, must not be null or empty
      ascending - true for ASC, false for DESC
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if fieldName is null or empty
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • limit

      QueryBuilder<T> limit(int maxResults)
      Sets the maximum number of results to return.
      Parameters:
      maxResults - the maximum number of results, must be positive
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if maxResults is not positive
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • offset

      QueryBuilder<T> offset(int skipCount)
      Sets the number of results to skip.
      Parameters:
      skipCount - the number of results to skip, must not be negative
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if skipCount is negative
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • page

      QueryBuilder<T> page(int pageNumber, int pageSize)
      Sets pagination using page number and page size.
      Parameters:
      pageNumber - the page number (0-based), must not be negative
      pageSize - the page size, must be positive
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if pageNumber is negative or pageSize is not positive
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • exists

      QueryBuilder<T> exists(QueryBuilder<?> subquery)
      Adds an EXISTS subquery condition.
      Parameters:
      subquery - the subquery builder, must not be null
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if subquery is null
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • notExists

      QueryBuilder<T> notExists(QueryBuilder<?> subquery)
      Adds a NOT EXISTS subquery condition.
      Parameters:
      subquery - the subquery builder, must not be null
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if subquery is null
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • in

      QueryBuilder<T> in(String fieldName, QueryBuilder<?> subquery)
      Adds an IN subquery condition.
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the field name, must not be null or empty
      subquery - the subquery builder, must not be null
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if fieldName is null/empty or subquery is null
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • notIn

      QueryBuilder<T> notIn(String fieldName, QueryBuilder<?> subquery)
      Adds a NOT IN subquery condition.
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the field name, must not be null or empty
      subquery - the subquery builder, must not be null
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if fieldName is null/empty or subquery is null
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • customFunction

      QueryBuilder<T> customFunction(String functionName, String fieldName, Object... parameters)
      Adds a custom database function call.
      Parameters:
      functionName - the name of the database function, must not be null or empty
      fieldName - the field to apply the function to, must not be null or empty
      parameters - additional function parameters, may be empty but not null
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if functionName or fieldName is null or empty, or parameters is null
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • nativeQuery

      QueryBuilder<T> nativeQuery(String sqlQuery)
      Executes a native SQL query instead of JPA criteria.
      Parameters:
      sqlQuery - the native SQL query string, must not be null or empty
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if sqlQuery is null or empty
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • parameter

      QueryBuilder<T> parameter(String parameterName, Object parameterValue)
      Sets a named parameter for native queries.
      Parameters:
      parameterName - the parameter name, must not be null or empty
      parameterValue - the parameter value, may be null
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if parameterName is null or empty
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • parameters

      QueryBuilder<T> parameters(Map<String,Object> parameterMap)
      Sets multiple named parameters for native queries.
      Parameters:
      parameterMap - map of parameter names and values, must not be null
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if parameterMap is null
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • cached

      QueryBuilder<T> cached()
      Enables caching for this query with default settings.
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • cached

      QueryBuilder<T> cached(String cacheRegionName)
      Enables caching for this query in the specified cache region.
      Parameters:
      cacheRegionName - the cache region name, must not be null or empty
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if cacheRegionName is null or empty
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • cached

      QueryBuilder<T> cached(long timeToLiveSeconds)
      Enables caching for this query with specified time-to-live.
      Parameters:
      timeToLiveSeconds - the cache entry TTL in seconds, must not be negative
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if timeToLiveSeconds is negative
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • hint

      QueryBuilder<T> hint(String hintName, Object hintValue)
      Sets a query hint for performance tuning.
      Parameters:
      hintName - the hint name, must not be null or empty
      hintValue - the hint value, may be null
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if hintName is null or empty
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • fetchSize

      QueryBuilder<T> fetchSize(int fetchSize)
      Sets the fetch size hint for result processing.
      Parameters:
      fetchSize - the fetch size, must be positive
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if fetchSize is not positive
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • timeout

      QueryBuilder<T> timeout(int timeoutSeconds)
      Sets the query timeout in seconds.
      Parameters:
      timeoutSeconds - the timeout in seconds, must not be negative
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if timeoutSeconds is negative
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • findAll

      List<T> findAll()
      Executes the query and returns all matching results.
      Returns:
      list of matching entities, never null but may be empty
      Throws:
      QueryExecutionException - if query execution fails
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • findOne

      T findOne()
      Executes the query and returns the first result, or null if no results.
      Returns:
      the first matching entity or null if no results found
      Throws:
      QueryExecutionException - if query execution fails
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • count

      long count()
      Executes a count query and returns the number of matching results.
      Returns:
      the count of matching entities, always non-negative
      Throws:
      QueryExecutionException - if query execution fails
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • exists

      boolean exists()
      Checks if any results exist for this query.
      Returns:
      true if at least one result exists, false otherwise
      Throws:
      QueryExecutionException - if query execution fails
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • findAllAsync

      CompletableFuture<List<T>> findAllAsync()
      Executes the query asynchronously and returns all matching results.
      Returns:
      CompletableFuture containing list of matching entities, never null
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • findOneAsync

      CompletableFuture<T> findOneAsync()
      Executes the query asynchronously and returns the first result.
      Returns:
      CompletableFuture containing the first matching entity or null
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • countAsync

      CompletableFuture<Long> countAsync()
      Executes a count query asynchronously.
      Returns:
      CompletableFuture containing the count of matching entities
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • findPage

      Page<T> findPage()
      Executes the query and returns paginated results with metadata.
      Returns:
      a Page containing results and pagination information, never null
      Throws:
      QueryExecutionException - if query execution fails
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • build

      DynamicQuery<T> build()
      Builds and returns a DynamicQuery instance without executing it. This allows for query reuse and performance optimization.
      Returns:
      a DynamicQuery instance representing this builder's state, never null
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • toSQL

      String toSQL()
      Generates the SQL representation of this query for debugging purposes.
      Returns:
      the generated SQL string, never null but may be empty if not available
      Since:
      1.0.0

    • getExecutionStats

      QueryStats getExecutionStats()
      Returns query execution statistics and performance metrics.
      Returns:
      QueryStats containing execution information, never null
      Since:
      1.0.0
